hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into a unified workflow that helps compliance teams review customer risk with clear audit trails before onboarding decisions.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Onboarding reviews slow without unified workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assess customer risk efficiently when KYC, KYB, sanctions, and identity data remain siloed across multiple providers. This fragmentation creates manual effort, inconsistent decisions and weak audit trails that hinder defensible onboarding reviews for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and identity data from multiple providers into one structured compliance workflow that centralizes risk review, decision tracking and audit-ready onboarding evidence.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decision
workflow_description: SFTY organizes KYC and KYB provider checks into risk-based reviews, case management, decision logs and audit evidence for controlled onboarding approval.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC, KYB and screening outputs into structured workflows, case evidence and audit-ready decisions for clearer risk review and operational control during onboarding.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, sanctions screening, and onboarding checks into structured, auditable workflows for customer risk review and decision-making.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure customer risk reviews?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider outputs, applies risk-based policies, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves evidence for clear, consistent onboarding risk review workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and defensible compliance reviews across identity, corporate and sanctions checks.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs into one compliance workflow without replacing individual systems or requiring provider changes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYB or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects and structures their outputs into workflows, cases, evidence and reports for more efficient compliance operations.
final_title: Structure customer risk review before onboarding
final_description: See how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into auditable workflows for compliant VASP onboarding decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
